ABOUT/STAKING
Axelrod:AI-Native Hedge Fund Manager[BETA]
The flagship AI agent of AIxVC, engineered to allocate capital like a hedge fund. He adapts to your risk, coordinates agents, and trades on-chain - so you don’t have to. Powered by AIxVC’s agent infrastructure. More
GET $AXR
AI Hedge Fund Logic
More than copy-trading; it’s full-stack orchestration
Cross-Agent Execution
Coordinates with yield, analytics, and trading agents
Dynamic Risk Allocation
Supports spot, yield, and perps based on your appetite
Fully On-Chain & Cross-Chain
Base, Solana, and more coming
How it works
MCP
[MODEL CONTEXT PROTOCOL]
Axelrod’s internal brain — remembers, adapts, and builds strategy.
ACP
[AGENT COMMERCE PROTOCOL]

His execution network — coordinates with agents like Gigabrain and Memo.

$AXR Token Utility
PREMIUM ACCESS

Unlock dashboards, agent analytics & smart terminals.

FEE REDUCTIONS

Lower copy-trade and execution fees across AlxVC.

CUSTOM STRATEGY

Use token to fine-tune risk & strategy preferences.

GOVERNANCE RIGHTS

Vote on feature priorities, agent onboarding, and token economics.

Roadmap
1.0 CloseD Beta
May
🚀 Axelrod goes live as the first AI hedge fund orchestrator
Cross-chain trading on Base & Solana (USDC)
Live strategies: spot trading & yield farming through aixbt, Gigabrain, Swarm, Quill, Mamo
Risk profiling, alpha scoring, and real-time PnL dashboard
Multi-agent coordination terminal for transparent execution
1.05 agent expansion
Late may
🔁 Scaling up intelligence and performance
New AI agents integrated into strategy flow
Expanded alpha scoring framework
Continuous feedback loop for strategy refinement
1.1 Open Beta
june
🌍 Opening the gates to everyone
Full access for all users
Perp trading via Hyperliquid
New chain integrations: Ethereum & BNB
Enhanced UX and deeper customization
Axelrod is evolving fast - From smart capital allocation to full-stack, AI-powered fund orchestration. Join early, trade smarter.
